name: Shandong Huatai Paper Industry Shareholding Co.,Ltd
summary: Shandong Huatai Paper Industry Shareholding Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells paper products in China. Its primary products include high-grade news, high-grade coated, offset, double and light adhesive tape, textbook, glossy, electrostatic copy, and household papers. The company also provides chlorine, caustic soda, and hydrogen peroxide. It also exports its products to India, Southeast Asia, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Shandong Huatai Paper Co., LTD. Shandong Huatai Paper Industry Shareholding Co.,Ltd was founded in 1993 and is based in Dongying, China.
